content.full_text:
March 23, 1990

Kathryn Donovan, Esq.
General Counsel
Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J Street, Suite 800
Sacramento, California 95804-0807

Dear Ms. Donovan:

This letter requests clarification of advice I received in November 1989 regarding candidate controlled ballot measure committees. At that time, I was advised that candidate controlled committees were not permitted to make contributions to ballot measure committees controlled by candidates or officeholders. (Davidson Advice Letter, No. I-89-576).

It is my understanding that on March 13, 1990, the Commission agreed to allow candidate controlled committees to make contributions to ballot measure committees controlled by candidates or officeholders. Please be so kind as to provide a modification of the prior advice reflecting the current Commission advice. Thank you for your attention to this matter.

Please feel free to contact us if you have any questions.

Sincerely,

Cary Davidson

CD:jd
CD00323.1
